name: KubeVirt_Cluster_Overview
description: Cluster-wide health, VM counts, and migration status for KubeVirt/OpenShift Virtualization
technology: Collects cluster-level metrics from Thanos/Prometheus for KubeVirt monitoring

dataPoints.name: vms_total
dataPoints.description: Total number of VMs across all namespaces

dataPoints.name: vms_running
dataPoints.description: Number of VMs in running phase

dataPoints.name: allocatable_nodes
dataPoints.description: Number of nodes available for KubeVirt workloads

dataPoints.name: nodes_with_kvm
dataPoints.description: Number of nodes with KVM support enabled
dataPoints.alertExprNote: Alert when no nodes have KVM support

dataPoints.name: system_health
dataPoints.alertExprNote: Alert when system health is degraded or unhealthy
